input.background: Table 18.7 is based on results from the Youth Risk Behavior Surveillance (YRBS) system. The number of adolescents who had been in a car or other vehicle when the driver had been drinking alcohol is cross tabulated according to racial/ethnic group classifications.
input.question: Calculate prevalences proportions for each of the groups.

Positive.description: Number of adolescents who had been in a car or other vehicle when the driver had been drinking alcohol within the past 30 days.

Negative.description: Number of adolescents who had not been in a car or other vehicle when the driver had been drinking alcohol within the past 30 days.

Total.description: Total number of adolescents surveyed in each racial/ethnic group.
